public_settings.name: RuntimeEnabled
public_settings.description: Defines if the runtime security module should be enabled

public_settings.name: EnforcementBinaryExcluded
public_settings.description: EnforcementBinaryExcluded defines the list of binaries that are excluded from the enforcement

public_settings.name: EnforcementRuleSourceAllowed
public_settings.description: EnforcementRuleSourceAllowed defines the list of rule sources that are allowed

public_settings.name: HashResolverCacheSize
public_settings.description: HashResolverCacheSize defines the number of hashes to keep in cache

public_settings.name: HashResolverEnabled
public_settings.description: HashResolverEnabled defines if the hash resolver should be enabled

public_settings.name: HashResolverEventTypes
public_settings.description: HashResolverEventTypes defines the list of event which files may be hashed

public_settings.name: HashResolverHashAlgorithms
public_settings.description: HashResolverHashAlgorithms defines the hashes that hash resolver needs to compute

public_settings.name: HashResolverMaxFileSize
public_settings.description: HashResolverMaxFileSize defines the maximum size of the files that the hash resolver is allowed to hash

public_settings.name: HashResolverMaxHashRate
public_settings.description: HashResolverMaxHashRate defines the rate at which the hash resolver may compute hashes

public_settings.name: HashResolverReplace
public_settings.description: HashResolverReplace is used to apply specific hash to specific file path

public_settings.name: RemoteConfigurationDumpPolicies
public_settings.description: RemoteConfigurationDumpPolicies defines whether to dump remote config policy

public_settings.name: SSHUserSessionsEnabled
public_settings.description: SSHUserSessionsEnabled defines if SSH user session features should be enabled

warning_settings.name: CaptureAllSyscallErrorsEnabled
warning_settings.description: CaptureAllSyscallErrorsEnabled, when true, sets the eBPF load-time constant so IS_UNHANDLED_ERROR treats every negative syscall return as handled.
